div.p: On December 13, 1954, the United States and Guatemala signed at Washington an agreement providing for development assistance to Guatemala, which entered into force on the same date. For text of the agreement, see 5 UST (pt. 3) 2972, or TIAS No. 3155. For additional information, see Department of State press release 715, dated December 13, 1954, in the Department of State Bulletin, December 27, 1954, page 985.
